candidate_check.description: Kubernetes API Server audit logs must be enabled.

check_content_excerpt:
Change to the /etc/kubernetes/manifests directory on the Kubernetes Control Plane. Run the command:
grep -i audit-policy-file * 

If the setting "audit-policy-file" is not set or is found in the Kubernetes API manifest file without valid content, this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: Edit the Kubernetes API Server manifest file in the /etc/kubernetes/manifests directory on the Kubernetes Control Plane. Set the argument "--audit-policy-file" to "log file directory".
title: Kubernetes API Server audit logs must be enabled.
